{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Stranger
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A stranger in brown and green clothes with a dirt-spattered cloak enters the forge.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
